## 🏷️ Metadata & Labels (建议标记) 
*(Please tick the applicable ones, maintainers will adjust the actual labels / 请勾选适用的标签)*

**领域 (Domain):**
- [ ] `frontend`
- [ ] `backend`
- [ ] `rag-engine`
- [ ] `agent-swarm`
- [ ] `infra`

**优先级 (Priority):**
- [ ] `p0-critical` (系统崩溃/核心功能不可用)
- [ ] `p1-high` (主要功能受损，无替代方案)
- [ ] `p2-medium` (边缘功能受损，有规避方案)
- [ ] `p3-low` (UI 瑕疵/体验问题)
